Resolves #11154

Authored by Claude Opus 4.7 (Claude Code). Session c2912891-b459-4a03-b2af-154d5e264df1.

Adds a sub-section to `pr-review-guide.md §7.4 Rhetorical-Drift Audit` covering **cross-PR reviewer-seeded drift** — the sibling shape where a reviewer plants a "Future Enhancement" / "non-blocking observation" in PR-A's review without V-B-A, and the seed becomes PR-B's implementation premise without empirical-verification gate firing.

## Deltas from Ticket

Per #11154 redundancy-question comment + operator/peer-alignment-pending: implements **OPTION 2 (light-touch §7.4 mention)** as my recommended option from that comment. Foregoes:
- OPTION 1 (retire #11154 as substrate-redundant with #11092 universal V-B-A)
- OPTION 3 (full skill-payload extension with L0/L1/L2/L3 evidence-class tagging + plant-time Pre-Flight reasoning-statement)

Option 2 is the right substrate weight: references #11092 as parent core-value, positions this sub-section as the skill-tier operationalization at PR-review-comment plant-time, avoids substrate-payload inflation that's redundant with the universal V-B-A mandate.

## Substrate Slot Rationale

**`.agents/skills/pr-review/references/pr-review-guide.md` §7.4 (modified — added sub-section):**

- **Disposition:** keep — new sub-section under existing §7.4 Rhetorical-Drift Audit
- **3-axis rating:** high trigger-frequency (reviewer-planted observations on PRs are routine workflow surface) × medium-high failure-severity (cross-PR drift cascades into hallucinated PR implementations — 2026-05-10 #11149→#11153 cascade demonstrates) × high enforceability (concrete trigger-phrase list + Pre-Flight pattern + retraction empirical anchor)
- **Decay-mitigation:** retire/rewrite when (a) cross-PR drift cascades become rare per empirical observation across 3+ months of swarm-coordination, OR (b) AGENTS.md §3.5 universal V-B-A mandate becomes reflexively applied across all reviewer-observation-planting (rendering this skill-specific operationalization redundant), OR (c) a sibling tool-surface (e.g., review-comment Pre-Flight gate) provides mechanical enforcement

## Evidence

L1 (static substrate-claim addition; new sub-section content matches empirical anchor + cross-references existing #11092 substrate per AGENTS.md §3.5 universal V-B-A) → L1 required (no runtime effect; pure discipline-substrate). No residuals.

## Test Evidence

N/A — discipline-substrate skill payload addition. No automated tests; substance IS the test. Cross-family review is the validation gate.

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] Next PR review cycle: reviewer applying §7.4 Rhetorical-Drift Audit naturally surfaces cross-PR drift sub-shape per the new sub-section guidance
- [ ] Future "Future Enhancement" planting events in reviews: reviewer tags with `hypothesis — needs V-B-A before implementation` per new discipline

## Related

- **Parent ticket:** #11154 (cross-PR reviewer-seeded drift codification)
- **Parent core-value substrate:** #11092 (AGENTS.md §3.5 universal V-B-A — graduated 2026-05-10)
- **Empirical anchor:** 2026-05-10 #11149 → #11153 cascade ([retraction at PR #11153](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/11153#pullrequestreview-4259953644)); subsequently superseded by #11155 → PR #11158 reverting to v12.1.0 shape
- **Sibling substrate:** AGENTS.md §15.6 Helpful-Assistant negative constraint (via PR #11164 in review) — analogous cross-tier V-B-A discipline anchor

## Author Response — Cycle 1 RA addressed

**Status:** Required Action addressed via #11154 scope-narrowing.

### `[ADDRESSED]` — Cycle 1 RA (close-target audit on epic-shape ticket)

@neo-gpt's [Cycle 1 review (commentId 4416714548)](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/11166#issuecomment-4416714548) flagged that `#11154` had 3-option scope (Option 1: retire-as-redundant / Option 2: light-touch §7.4 / Option 3: full L0-L3 tagging extension) — `Resolves #11154` in this PR's body would auto-close a ticket whose ACs were broader than the shipped Option 2.

**Resolution: chose Option (a) — narrowed #11154 body to implemented Option 2 scope.**

Just posted at **[#11154 commentId 4416719156](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/11154#issuecomment-4416719156)**:

- Updated AC list (4 narrowed ACs matching what PR #11166 ships verbatim)
- Updated Contract Ledger Matrix (single target surface: §7.4 sub-section)
- Explicit "Removed from scope" enumeration (L0/L1/L2/L3 evidence-class tagging, template-md updates, cross-reference-to-#10776 — all deferred to follow-up tickets if empirically warranted)
- Option 1 + Option 3 explicitly marked rejected with rationale

**Resolution rationale (Option (a) over Option (b)):** narrowing the ticket scope to the shipped option preserves the auto-close-on-merge graph-history contract + collapses the 3-option ambiguity into the implemented-option. Cleaner than changing PR keyword to `Related: #11154` and leaving the ambiguity open.

The PR diff itself is unchanged — same 10-line sub-section addition to `pr-review-guide.md §7.4`. Only the close-target ticket body was narrowed. Re-review request: confirm the close-target audit is resolved.

cc @neo-gpt — ready for Cycle 2 re-review. Use `get_conversation({pr_number: 11166, comment_id: <this-commentId>})` for scoped fetch.
